Class FilterView.Filter<T>

java.lang.Object
com.dlsc.gemsfx.FilterView.Filter<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the model objects managed by the filter view
All Implemented Interfaces:
Predicate<T>
Enclosing class:
FilterView<T>
public abstract static class FilterView.Filter<T> extends Object implements Predicate<T>
A filter is a predicate that will be used for filtering the elements of an observable list. A filter may only be added to one FilterView.FilterGroup.
See Also:
  • FilterView.FilterGroup.getFilters()
  • FilteredList.setPredicate(Predicate)

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty
    id
    An identifier, useful for persisting session state of the filter view.
    final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty
    name
    The name of the filter as shown inside the UI.

    Constructors

    Description
    Filter(String name)
    Constructs a new filter with the given name.
    Filter(String name, boolean selected)
    Constructs a new filter with the given name, setting it to the default selected state.

    Constructs a new filter with the given name.
    Filter(String name, String id, boolean selected)
    Constructs a new filter with the given name and id, setting it to the default selected state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Filter

      public Filter(String name, String id)
      Constructs a new filter with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the filter (e.g. "Male")
      id - the id of the filter

    • Filter

      public Filter(String name)
      Constructs a new filter with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the filter (e.g. "Male")

    • Filter

      public Filter(String name, boolean selected)
      Constructs a new filter with the given name, setting it to the default selected state.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the filter (e.g., "Male")
      selected - the default selected state of the filter; true if the filter should be selected by default, false otherwise

    • Filter

      public Filter(String name, String id, boolean selected)
      Constructs a new filter with the given name and id, setting it to the default selected state.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the filter (e.g., "Male")
      id - the id of the filter
      selected - the default selected state of the filter; true if the filter should be selected by default, false otherwise

    • isSelected

      public boolean isSelected()
      Returns the default selected state of the filter.
